brand.name: Yuanda Commercial Products
brand.legalName: Suzhou Yuanda Commercial Products Co., Ltd.

positioning.en: Industrial-grade supermarket, retail and warehouse equipment manufacturer
positioning.zh: 工业级商超、零售与仓储设备制造商
positioning.de: Hersteller von Supermarkt-, Einzelhandels- und Lagerausstattung in Industriequalitat
positioning.es: Fabricante industrial de equipos para supermercados, retail y almacenes

title.en: Shelving, racks and trolleys engineered for high-traffic retail operations.
title.zh: 面向高频零售场景的货架、仓储架与购物车系统。
title.de: Regale, Lagergestelle und Einkaufswagen fur stark frequentierte Retail-Umgebungen.
title.es: Estanterias, racks y carros disenados para operaciones retail de alto trafico.

sub.en: 20 years on Alibaba.com, 18,505 m2 floorspace, full customization and drawing-based manufacturing.
sub.zh: 20年国际站经验，18,505平方米厂区，支持全定制与图纸定制生产。
sub.de: 20 Jahre auf Alibaba.com, 18.505 m2 Werkflache, Vollanpassung und Fertigung nach Zeichnung.
sub.es: 20 anos en Alibaba.com, 18.505 m2 de planta, personalizacion completa y fabricacion basada en planos.

title.en: Modular supermarket shelving for stores, grocery chains and wholesale clubs.
title.zh: 适用于门店、连锁商超与批发会员店的模块化商超货架。
title.de: Modulare Supermarktregale fur Stores, Lebensmittelketten und Grosshandelsclubs.
title.es: Estanterias modulares para tiendas, cadenas de supermercados y clubes mayoristas.

sub.en: Powder-coated steel structures, configurable sizes, display accessories and project-based production.
sub.zh: 粉末喷涂钢结构，可配置尺寸、展示配件与项目制生产。
sub.de: Pulverbeschichtete Stahlkonstruktionen, konfigurierbare Grossen, Display-Zubehor und Projektfertigung.
sub.es: Estructuras de acero con recubrimiento en polvo, medidas configurables, accesorios y produccion por proyecto.

title.en: Shopping trolleys and baskets built for durability, brand identity and daily rotation.
title.zh: 兼顾耐用、品牌形象与日常高周转的购物车与购物篮。
title.de: Einkaufswagen und Korbe fur Haltbarkeit, Markenauftritt und tagliche Nutzung.
title.es: Carros y cestas para durabilidad, identidad de marca y rotacion diaria.

sub.en: Metal, plastic and hybrid options with logo customization and export-ready packing.
sub.zh: 支持金属、塑料与复合结构，提供LOGO定制与出口包装。
sub.de: Metall-, Kunststoff- und Hybridoptionen mit Logo-Anpassung und exportfertiger Verpackung.
sub.es: Opciones metalicas, plasticas e hibridas con logo personalizado y embalaje de exportacion.

desc.en: Supplier assessment, onsite check and verified production capabilities support B2B project trust.
desc.zh: 供应商评估、实地验厂与认证产能信息，支撑B2B项目采购信任。
desc.de: Supplier Assessment, Vor-Ort-Prufung und verifizierte Produktionskapazitaten schaffen Vertrauen.
desc.es: Evaluacion de proveedor, inspeccion onsite y capacidad verificada generan confianza.

desc.en: Custom dimensions, structures, accessories and finishes for retail chain rollout projects.
desc.zh: 支持零售连锁项目所需的尺寸、结构、配件与表面处理定制。
desc.de: Individuelle Abmessungen, Strukturen, Zubehor und Oberflachen fur Retail-Rollouts.
desc.es: Medidas, estructuras, accesorios y acabados a medida para proyectos retail.

desc.en: Raw material identification, QA/QC inspectors and export packing checks reduce delivery risk.
desc.zh: 原材料识别、QA/QC检验与出口包装检查，降低交付风险。
desc.de: Materialidentifikation, QA/QC und Exportverpackungsprufung reduzieren Risiken.
desc.es: Identificacion de materias primas, QA/QC y control de embalaje reducen riesgos.

desc.en: Response time within 2 hours and experienced trade staff help shorten specification cycles.
desc.zh: 2小时内响应，成熟外贸团队帮助缩短规格确认周期。
desc.de: Antwortzeit unter 2 Stunden und erfahrenes Exportteam verkurzen Abstimmungen.
desc.es: Respuesta en 2 horas y equipo exportador experto acortan la definicion tecnica.

desc.en: Main markets include Europe, North America, Oceania and South America for retail equipment buyers.
desc.zh: 主要市场覆盖欧洲、北美、大洋洲与南美，适合商超设备采购商。
desc.de: Hauptmarkte sind Europa, Nordamerika, Ozeanien und Sudamerika.
desc.es: Mercados principales: Europa, Norteamerica, Oceania y Sudamerica.

sub.en: Gondola shelves, display racks and customized store shelving systems.
sub.zh: 中岛货架、陈列架与定制门店货架系统。
sub.es: Gondolas, racks de exhibicion y sistemas personalizados.

sub.en: Adjustable steel racks, storage shelves and heavy-duty warehouse systems.
sub.zh: 可调钢制货架、仓储层架与重型仓储系统。
sub.es: Racks ajustables, estanterias y sistemas pesados.

sub.en: Metal trolleys, plastic carts, baskets and retail mobility accessories.
sub.zh: 金属购物车、塑料购物车、购物篮与零售移动配件。
sub.es: Carros metalicos, plasticos, cestas y accesorios.

desc.en: Assessed supplier information and onsite verification are available on Alibaba.com.
desc.zh: 国际站页面显示供应商评估与实地认证信息。
desc.de: Bewertete Lieferanteninformationen und Vor-Ort-Prufung sind verfugbar.
desc.es: Informacion evaluada e inspeccion onsite disponibles.

desc.en: Raw material identification, traceability and 3 QA/QC inspectors are shown in the store profile.
desc.zh: 店铺资料显示原材料识别与追溯能力，并配备3名QA/QC检验员。
desc.es: Identificacion y trazabilidad de materias primas con 3 inspectores QA/QC.

description.en: The Alibaba.com profile indicates offline trade shows attended twice. Add booth photos and fair names in admin mode when available.
description.zh: 国际站资料显示曾参加2次线下展会。后续可在管理员模式补充展会名称、展位号与照片。
description.de: Das Profil zeigt zwei besuchte Offline-Messen. Messeinfos konnen im Admin-Modus erganzt werden.
description.es: El perfil indica dos ferias presenciales. Se pueden anadir nombres, stands y fotos en modo admin.

notes.en: Trade show record placeholder based on supplier profile.
notes.zh: 基于供应商资料预留的展会记录。
notes.es: Marcador basado en el perfil del proveedor.

sub.en: Retail chains, grocery stores and warehouse clubs.
sub.zh: 连锁零售、食品商超与仓储会员店。
sub.es: Cadenas retail, supermercados y clubes mayoristas.

sub.en: Southern and Eastern Europe project sourcing.
sub.es: Abastecimiento de proyectos en Europa del Sur y Este.

sub.en: Durable store equipment for regional retail expansion.
sub.zh: 适合区域零售扩张的耐用门店设备。
高性价比货架与购物车解决方案。
sub.es: Soluciones rentables de estanterias y carros.

intelligence.c: Retail chain procurement teams, supermarket equipment distributors, warehouse project contractors and store fixture buyers.
Public page lacks verified client names, detailed certificates, exhibition photos and direct company email. Collect before deployment.
Lead with verified factory capacity, project customization, on-time delivery and category breadth rather than low price.

sop.c: Ask for store layout, target shelf dimensions, load-bearing requirement, finish color, quantity, destination port and rollout timeline.
Recommend one gondola shelf unit or trolley sample, confirm sample cost, packaging, lead time and freight method before bulk quotation.
Send 3D layout or drawing confirmation, QC checklist and delivery schedule to reduce buyer uncertainty.

whySub.en: Verified manufacturing signals, project customization and export discipline are presented as buyer-facing trust assets.
whySub.zh: 把认证制造、项目定制和出口交付能力转化为买家可感知的信任资产。
whySub.de: Verifizierte Fertigung, Projektanpassung und Exportdisziplin als Vertrauenssignale.
whySub.es: Senales verificadas de fabricacion, personalizacion y exportacion.

fairSub.en: A structured fair history area is reserved for booth photos, editions and upcoming events.
fairSub.zh: 预留结构化展会历史区域，用于补充展位照片、届次与未来参展计划。
fairSub.de: Strukturierter Messebereich fur Fotos, Ausgaben und kommende Events.
fairSub.es: Area de historial de ferias para fotos, ediciones y eventos.

catsSub.en: Three product systems derived from the public store: supermarket shelving, warehouse storage and retail mobility hardware.
catsSub.zh: 从公开店铺提炼三大系统：商超货架、仓储设备、零售移动设备。
catsSub.de: Drei Produktsysteme aus dem Shop: Supermarktregale, Lager und Retail-Mobilitat.
catsSub.es: Tres sistemas: estanterias, almacenaje y movilidad retail.

certSub.en: Keep evidence visible: assessment links, QC signals, production capacity and export-readiness.
certSub.zh: 把评估链接、质控、产能和出口能力放在买家可见位置。
certSub.de: Nachweise sichtbar halten: Bewertung, QC, Kapazitat, Export.
certSub.es: Mantener visible la evidencia: evaluacion, QC, capacidad y exportacion.

processSub.en: A practical B2B path from specification to delivery.
processSub.zh: 从规格确认到交付的实用 B2B 项目路径。
processSub.de: Praktischer B2B-Weg von Spezifikation bis Lieferung.
processSub.es: Ruta B2B desde especificacion hasta entrega.

partnersSub.en: Client logos can be replaced after the factory provides authorized references; current blocks show buyer profiles.
partnersSub.zh: 客户授权 Logo 到位后可替换；当前以买家类型画像做高级占位。
partnersSub.de: Logos konnen nach Autorisierung ersetzt werden.
partnersSub.es: Los logos se reemplazan tras autorizacion.

regionSub.en: Focus on retail equipment distributors, chain-store rollout contractors and warehouse solution partners.
regionSub.zh: 面向商超设备经销商、连锁门店项目承包商与仓储方案伙伴。
regionSub.de: Fokus auf Retail-Ausstatters, Rollout-Partner und Lagerlosungen.
regionSub.es: Enfoque en distribuidores, contratistas retail y soluciones de almacen.

contactSub.en: Share drawings, target dimensions, quantity and delivery market for a reliable quotation.
contactSub.zh: 发送图纸、目标尺寸、数量与交付市场，便于快速准确报价。
contactSub.de: Zeichnungen, Masse, Menge und Zielmarkt senden.
contactSub.es: Enviar planos, medidas, cantidad y mercado destino.

c.en: Store layout, dimensions, load-bearing, finish and quantity.
c.zh: 确认门店布局、尺寸、承重、表面处理与数量。
c.de: Layout, Masse, Traglast, Finish und Menge.
c.es: Layout, medidas, carga, acabado y cantidad.

c.en: Confirm drawing, sample cost, packaging and freight method.
c.zh: 确认图纸、样品费、包装与运输方式。
c.es: Confirmar plano, muestra, embalaje y flete.

c.en: QC checkpoints for raw materials, welding, coating and packing.
c.zh: 覆盖原料、焊接、喷涂与包装的质检节点。
c.de: QC fur Material, Schweissen, Beschichtung und Verpackung.
c.es: QC en materia prima, soldadura, recubrimiento y empaque.

c.en: Export packing, shipment coordination and rollout support.
c.zh: 出口包装、船运协调与项目落地支持。
c.es: Embalaje, coordinacion y soporte de rollout.
